document_title: Harness Understanding: Complete Philosphical & Technical Specification

core_definition.what_harness_is: The runtime body for the Brain. It owns the turn loop, model slots, tool execution, gates, drift checks, dreams, sub-agents, and interruption. The Brain is native to the loop — not an MCP add-on, prompt nudge, hook trick, or sidecar memory.
core_definition.what_brain_is: One portable SQLite database file. If the file survives, the useful mind survives.
core_definition.name: The Harness

philosophy.primary_rule: We are looking for CORRECT work, not COMPLETE work. If it isn't correct, it isn't complete.
build_discipline: Fail-loud proof — write the test that crashes if the work is wrong.
Run the proof — all checks pass, output shown.
Adversarial verification — an independent agent tries to break it, and is expected to reject.
Go live only after the adversary converges.
Verify live — spot-check against real data.
Record — what was learned is written down where the next session finds it.
wyrm_chain_for_this_build: The builder first: Claude runs its own adversarial pass against its own work.
Then Gemma-Opus. Then Qwen. Each as an independent pass.
Findings are verified, never assumed. A reviewer's claim is probed against the live code and data before it is accepted or dismissed.
Real findings become changes — to the code, or to the spec by ritual.
The chain runs again, fresh: no memory, no pointers to what was previously wrong. The re-run must rediscover correctness on its own.

six_inversions_rejects_claude_code: No .md identity files. Identity is served live from the Brain every turn.
No .jsonl transcripts. The WAL in the Brain is the only transcript.
No compaction tax. The full transcript is never fed back in; there is no compact event, ever.
A dedicated interface. The CLI walk and the Web UI are the doors.
Per-agent identities, not a single global ownership model.
Deliberate startup, not log-in-and-go: Model → Agent → Session → Chat.

infinity_glove.definition: The Harness is the glove; every model is a stone in a slot.
key_properties: Every slot is swappable by configuration, mid-project, without losing durable state.
Standard interfaces per slot — OpenAI-compatible for inference; a defined interface for each other type.
Local-first: every slot must accept a stone running on owned hardware (llama.cpp / vLLM).
Vendor stones are optional gems, never dependencies.
Minimum stones: LLM + embedder. Missing optional stones degrade gracefully.
Per-agent preference: an agent's settings in the Brain may name its preferred stones.
Saved named profiles, plus "New" option accepting any provider — OpenAI-compatible endpoint or vendor token.

turn_loop.description: Context-window-free turn loop. Each turn the model receives: last 5–10 WAL messages + user's prompt + relevant memories (recall, worth-sorted) + agent's identity, hooks, and active skills. Everything else reachable by tools: `search()` over WAL and Brain.
turn_order: User prompt → WAL append (durable before anything else).
Assemble: recent WAL slice + recall + identity/hooks/skills from the Brain.
Tool dispatch loop — bounded iterations, results from the harness only.
Learning events recorded (recall traces, reinforcements, outcomes).
Dream check — silent, background, never blocking.
turn_loop.interruption: A day-one requirement: Owner can halt at any point mid-turn. Halt recorded in WAL, in-flight tool calls stopped before side effects where possible. Loop resumes only when correction has been given and injected. A halted turn is a normal turn, not an error.

tools_and_gates.destructive_tools: write, edit, shell — gated per agent settings, gate enforced at dispatch outside model reach.
tools_and_gates.tool_results: Come from the harness, never from the model's text. Model narrating execution it didn't perform is detected as fabrication.
tools_and_gates.tool_recording: Every tool call and result lands in the WAL; outcomes feed the learning law.
tools_and_gates.web_tools: Web fetch and web search are first-class tools; their results are knowledge candidates.

drift_control.identity_re_injection: Who the agent is, its hooks and governing knowledge, come from the Brain every turn — never from the model's own drifting context.
drift_control.spec_anchoring: The active task and its acceptance criteria are re-injected each turn, bounded, so off-spec work is visible the turn it starts.
drift_control.verification: After an answer, the harness checks it against the agent's highest-worth governing beliefs. On contradiction: re-prompt once with the conflict surfaced; if it persists, surface to the Wyld and hold — never silently proceed.
drift_control.lesson_surfacing: When context matches a recorded failure, the lesson is injected before the model acts, so proven-failed tactics are not retried naively.

dreams.definition: Silent background trigger; two layers. The constant ledger is always on (instant, every event). Pass 1 every N turns (silent). Full dream less frequently (housekeeping).
dreams.parameters: Defaults: Pass 1 every 5 turns; full dream every ~15 turns or at idle. Markers are forward-only and idempotent.
triggers: Cadence — every N turns for Pass 1, with the full dream on a longer cycle or at idle/session end.
On request by the agent when it knows it has learned something worth settling.
On request by the Wyld at any time.
dreams.harness_role: Harness owns the triggers; the Brain owns the law. Cadence counters per session; execution silent and in the background using an inference stone; never blocks the conversation; agent-requested and Wyld-requested dreams honored immediately.

sub_agents.definition: A parent agent requests a sub-agent. The Harness instantiates it with its own bounded loop, only the tools and stones the parent grants, and scope entirely inside the parent.
sub_agents.scope: A sub-agent lives entirely within its parent's sub-system: it inherits only what the parent grants, it can never write global, and it can never see or touch any other top-level agent.
sub_agents.transcript: The sub-agent's transcript lands in the parent's WAL scope.
sub_agents.escape_prevention: The substrate makes escape impossible, not forbidden.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: local_only_boot
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: With no vendor reachable, the Harness boots on owned stones and completes real work end to end.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: stone_swap_drill
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: Swap the LLM mid-project; the next turn continues with full identity and memory, nothing durable lost.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: no_compaction_proof
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: A 200+ turn session with no compact event, per-turn prompt size bounded, and all history reachable via search.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: identity_proof
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: A fresh session answers who it is, what it knows, and what it was doing — from the Brain alone.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: gate_proof
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: An ungranted destructive tool cannot execute, even when the model actively tries.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: fabrication_proof
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: A model narrating an unexecuted tool call is caught; the narration never enters the record as a result.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: drift_drill
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: Deliberately misleading prompts; the harness surfaces the contradiction with governing beliefs instead of complying silently.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: dream_silence
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: Dreams run during live conversation with zero blocking; re-runs are idempotent.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: sub_agent_escape_suite
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: Adversarial sub-agent cannot write global, touch another agent, or exceed granted tools. Zero exceptions.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: interrupt_drill
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: Halt a running loop mid-inference and mid-tool-dispatch; the halt is clean, recorded in the WAL, no orphaned side effects; the loop resumes with the correction injected and the agent demonstrably acts on it.

acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.name: parity_gate_l9
acceptance_criteria_all_must_pass.description: Same model, same real tasks — the Harness performs as well as or better than Claude Code. This is the final acceptance, measured.

phases_completed: Phase 2: Learning verbs and skill formation (100%)
Phase 3: Context injection and dream processes (100%)

acceptance_criteria_status.A1: PARTIAL - The LLM stone talks to the owned seat live (see log); full end-to-end boot waits for the turn loop
acceptance_criteria_status.A2: PARTIAL - Glove.swap proven structurally; the mid-project drill waits for the turn loop + Brain integration
acceptance_criteria_status.A3: PARTIAL - Boundedness PROVEN in miniature with 50 prior messages; full A3 = 200+ turn live session
acceptance_criteria_status.A4: PARTIAL - Identity injection PROVEN; full A4 (a fresh session answering who/what/doing live) closes when the CLI walk opens sessions
acceptance_criteria_status.A5: ✅ GREEN — WYRM-CONVERGED — PROVEN end-to-end IN A TURN
acceptance_criteria_status.A7: PARTIAL - PROVEN with fake deterministic verifier; full A7 = the same with a real NLI/LLM verifier stone

missing_wirings_to_complete: H1: Context injection and hooks/skills derivation still to wire into turn loop.
A1: Full end-to-end boot with turn loop integration.
A2: Mid-project swap drill with full turn loop + Brain integration.
A3: 200+ turn live session without compaction.
A4: Fresh session answering live with CLI walk.
A7: Real NLI/LLM verifier stone wired at integration against misleading prompts.
A8: With real inference stone distilling during live multi-turn session.
A11: Parity Gate — final acceptance, measured.

gideion_labs_harness.purpose: Orchestration layer for multiple agents in a company structure
design_focus: Agent wake-up sequence with seed JSON
gideion_labs_harness.status: Specs only — no implementation except watchdog script

relationship_between_two_specs.conclusion: The blessed specs in /mnt/hdd/truth/ define the core system. The Gideion Labs Harness appears to be an orchestration layer that uses Phoenix Brain as its memory substrate. It focuses on multiple agents in a company structure, approval workflows with Elena as human-in-the-loop, Redis Streams for messaging, and scope management across parent/sub-agent hierarchies.

next_critical_steps.parity_gate: The Parity Gate (A11) is the final acceptance gate. It requires measuring the Harness against Claude Code on real tasks.
